svg.text: select testdb.t1.id AS id,testdb.t1.a AS a,testdb.t1.b AS b,testdb.t1.c AS c,testdb.t1.d AS d
Left→right = execution order. Darker = more self-time. Click a node to pin details.
Where a warning applies: hover or click the node — details show “In Query Analysis”; the panel below lists the node label.
index_merge=on — Uses two or more index range scans on the same table and combines row IDs (union/intersection/sort_union) instead of falling back to a full scan. A composite
index_merge_intersection=on — Intersection variant: AND'ed predicates are satisfied by scanning each index and intersecting row IDs — useful when no single composite index
